concerns.detail: Gendered slur '学术妲己' (academic Daji) implying sexual manipulation to advance academically, accompanied by disgust expression 'yue'
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding 学术妲己  yue 被这个坑了

concerns.detail: Sustained personal attacks including '无能狂怒' (impotent rage), '不下头吗' (cringe/embarrassing), and '自己不行' (you're incompetent)
concerns.excerpt: 自己被MSU鸽了在这里无能狂怒，不下头吗？有本事自己申四大去啊...自己不行跑过来怪老师的
